message:
fix(ast_matcher): correct truncate_preview test assertions

The test had incorrect expectations for boundary cases:
- truncate_preview("你好世界", 4) returns the full string (4 chars <= 4 max)
- truncate_preview("你好世界", 3) returns "..." (4 > 3, truncates to 0+...)

The function only truncates when char_count > max_chars, and truncation
leaves room for "..." by taking at most max_chars-3 characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
